name: Rusty Alyce
title: Rider Remade

abilities.name: Chasing Fate
abilities.text: When this model is dealt damage, it may drain a (soulstone) to reduce an amount of damage equal to the turn number.

abilities.name: Cumbersome
abilities.text: This model may not scale terrain.

abilities.name: Hoofbeats of Ruin
abilities.text: When this model is hired, it must choose a crew card: Riders of Fate or Rust-Eaten Fate.

abilities.name: Nemesis (U, U, and U)
abilities.text: The U, U, and U abilities of enemy models within 3" are blank.

actions.name: Ride Them Down
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action was generated by the Charge action, it deals +1 damage.

triggers.name: Siphon Life
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage and this model heals 1.

actions.name: Clockwork Seeker
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This attack has a raise value of 3.

actions.name: Rust and Ruin
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Enemy only. Once per activation. Summon an Amalgam model into base contact with the target.

actions.name: "Think I Can Jump That?"
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target terrain. Place this model within 8" of its current location and in base contact with the target. If this action received a raise, place this model within 8" of its current location and within 3" of the target.

extraction_notes: Nemesis ability contains three special symbols that appear to be variations of 'U' with different accent marks or styling - rendered as U, U, and U
Rust and Ruin has an asterisk (*) in the TN column, which appears to indicate no TN rather than a specific value.
